### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Configuration](Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Configuration.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Configuration')

## EventStoreOptions Class

Global options for the Event Store client SDK\.
Configured via `AddEventStore(options => ...)` and available through `IOptions<EventStoreOptions>`\.

```csharp
public class EventStoreOptions
```

Inheritance [System\.Object](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.object 'System\.Object') &#129106; EventStoreOptions

### Remarks
This class uses the standard \.NET Options pattern \(POCO with parameterless constructor and settable properties\)
for compatibility with `IOptions<T>`, `IOptionsSnapshot<T>`, and `IOptionsMonitor<T>`\.
### Properties

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Configuration.EventStoreOptions.DefaultStateStoreSuffix'></a>

## EventStoreOptions\.DefaultStateStoreSuffix Property

Gets or sets the global default suffix for DAPR state store names\.
When `null`, the convention default `"eventstore"` is used, producing `{domain}-eventstore`\.
Setting this to e\.g\. `"store"` produces `{domain}-store` for all domains \(Layer 2 override\)\.

```csharp
public string? DefaultStateStoreSuffix { get; set; }
```

#### Property Value
[System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Configuration.EventStoreOptions.DefaultTopicSuffix'></a>

## EventStoreOptions\.DefaultTopicSuffix Property

Gets or sets the global default suffix for pub/sub topic patterns\.
When `null`, the convention default `"events"` is used, producing `{domain}.events`\.
Setting this overrides the topic suffix for all domains \(Layer 2 override\)\.

```csharp
public string? DefaultTopicSuffix { get; set; }
```

#### Property Value
[System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Configuration.EventStoreOptions.EnableRegistrationDiagnostics'></a>

## EventStoreOptions\.EnableRegistrationDiagnostics Property

Gets or sets a value indicating whether registration diagnostics are enabled\.
This minimal flag exists to validate global options configuration flow and can be expanded in later stories\.

```csharp
public bool EnableRegistrationDiagnostics { get; set; }
```

#### Property Value
[System\.Boolean](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.boolean 'System\.Boolean')
